route: Stay in the Tobago Cays area overnight, enjoying the protected reef water and keeping the day simple.
plannedActivity: Snorkeling, turtle watching, beach time, dinghy exploring, and a relaxed night in Tobago Cays.
captainNote: Tobago Cays overnight. Respect park and reef rules. Keep the boat secure and simple.

route: Move from Tobago Cays toward Union Island and the Frigate Island area, weather and comfort permitting.
plannedActivity: Short-hop sailing day, possible Happy Island stop, shore exploring, beach time, and anchorage setup.
captainNote: Keep the move short and comfortable. Watch reefs, traffic, and anchorage room.

route: Move toward Petit St. Vincent for a southern Grenadines day and overnight.
plannedActivity: Beach time, swimming, snorkeling, quiet island scenery, and a relaxed southern Grenadines night.
captainNote: Petit St. Vincent day. Keep an eye on clearance, anchoring rules, and conditions.

route: Move to Canouan and settle in for the first of two Canouan days.
plannedActivity: Canouan exploring, possible Scruffy's visit, shore time, beach time, and boat reset.
captainNote: Start the Canouan stop with a relaxed arrival and good anchorage check.

route: Canouan lay day with flexible local movement only if conditions and crew energy make sense.
plannedActivity: Second Canouan day for beach exploring, eating ashore, swimming, or simply resting aboard.
captainNote: Two-night Canouan stop. Good day to slow down and reset.

route: Flexible day. Choose the best anchorage based on weather, crew energy, and northbound planning.
plannedActivity: Open day for sailing, swimming, snorkeling, shore exploring, or staying put if the crew is happy.
captainNote: TBD day. Weather and crew comfort win.

route: Flexible cruising day. Begin thinking about the path back north while keeping the trip relaxed.
plannedActivity: Optional move, water time, beach time, and daily update for family with the latest plan.
captainNote: Keep the route flexible and avoid creating a rushed final return.

route: Final TBD day before staging toward Bequia. Pick the best stop for comfort and return timing.
plannedActivity: Flexible cruising, swimming, cleanup, organizing gear, and planning the Bequia move.
captainNote: Last flexible day before Bequia staging. Do not wait too late to plan the return.

route: Move to Bequia for the final island night and staging before returning to Blue Lagoon.
plannedActivity: Bequia shore time, final swim, dinner ashore or onboard, photo upload, and prepare for return leg.
captainNote: Bequia final island stop. Keep the boat organized for tomorrow.

route: Return to Blue Lagoon for debarkation and flight-home logistics.
plannedActivity: Debarkation, luggage, final boat check, airport transfer, and flight home.
captainNote: Blue Lagoon, debarkation, and flight home. Memories secured.
